channel.title: Chatura Dissanayake | Insights
channel.description: Process notes and decisions behind information design, data storytelling, and policy reports.

item.title: I Built a Data Story About Cyclone Ditwah. Here's Every Decision I Made and Why.
item.description: Behind the making of "How a Single Storm Broke Sri Lanka" - six iterations of a teardrop, a hero image that changed twice, and why restraint at the end is a design choice.
